# SpeakMove

> SpeakMove is a Telegram bot for English speaking practice, built for Russian and Ukrainian speaking immigrants in the United Kingdom. It trains spoken English through AI-driven voice dialogue on seven real UK life scenarios — phone calls with the landlord, GP appointments, work-coach meetings at Jobcentre, job interviews, parents' evenings, calls to banks and government, and small talk with colleagues.

## What SpeakMove does

- Voice-only practice (no text drills). The user records voice messages, the bot replies with a real British accent.
- Feedback in the user's native language (Russian or Ukrainian) — corrections, grammar tips, vocabulary in plain language.
- All inside Telegram: no app to install, no signup form. `/start` and go.
- Sessions are 10–15 minutes. The bot remembers context between sessions and can continue a previous conversation.

## Pricing

- One plan: £7.45 / month (about £0.25 / day).
- 7-day free trial, no card required.
- 60 minutes of voice conversation per week on the paid plan.
- Cancel in one click via Telegram settings or by emailing support.
- Transparent unit economics are published on the site: of the £7.45, roughly £6 covers AI infrastructure (speech recognition, language model, voice synthesis), payment processing and hosting; the remainder funds development and support.

## Who it's for

- Russian- or Ukrainian-speaking immigrants living in the UK.
- People whose written English is functional but whose spoken English is the bottleneck — avoiding GP appointments, asking a partner to call the landlord, going quiet at work-coach meetings.
- Adults across professions (care workers, IT, students, retail, restaurants, academics).

## Stages and status

- Currently V0 — early version. Operated as a UK sole trader (Dmytro Fenko, trading as SpeakMove, ICO registration ZC141876). Formal entity may change to a UK Ltd after the V0 validation; existing users are notified in advance.

## Operator and contact

- Operator: Dmytro Fenko, UK sole trader, trading as SpeakMove. Address for service of documents: Weston-super-Mare, UK, BS23 1RH.
- Data controller: registered with the UK Information Commissioner's Office (ICO), registration number ZC141876.
- Contact: hi@speakmove.app
- Telegram: https://t.me/speakmove_bot
